S.FORM: Jovan Adepo kawas tay 1988, Jovan Adepo, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Jovan Adepo kawas tay 1988, Jovan Adepo, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *o*an a*epo kawas~ɕ taj ****, *o*an a*epo, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
